response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack software craftsman with broad polyglot experience, but the role targets a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and deep AI/ML expertise, recognized AI products, and cloud platform strategy leadership. The resume shows ~15 years total but at Senior/Staff IC level with only recent, light exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling) and no demonstrated AI products, platform strategy, or executive-level advisory work.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops
concerns: No recognized AI products, platforms, or published AI/ML expertise
Lacks Principal/Director-level scope — no strategy, executive advisory, or org-wide influence
Limited cloud-platform depth; no demonstrated leadership at scale required for the role
